zh.Ashby, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Millicent Gournay於1189年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾時，她的父親Hugh de Gournay V42歲，母親Juliana Dammartin24歲。她於大約1210年與William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1239年在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯蒂斯享年50歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾傑維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Millicent Gournay于1189年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾时，她的父亲Hugh de Gournay V42岁，母亲Juliana Dammartin24岁。她于大约1210年与William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1239年在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯蒂斯享年50岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾傑維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gournay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Gourley  .

variants.name: Gourley
meanings: Scottish: possibly a Norman habitational name from North or South Gorley (Hampshire), or an unidentified place in Normandy, France.

nameMeanings.name: Millicent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Melisende, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from amal ‘labour’ + swinth ‘strength’. This was the name of a daughter of Charlemagne. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Millicent Gournay was born in 1189, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh de Gournay V, was 42 and her mother, Juliana Dammartin, was 24. She married William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo about 1210, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1239, in This, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 50, and was buried in Cherwell, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Millicent Gournay est née en 1189, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Gournay V, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Juliana Dammartin, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo environ 1210, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1239, à This, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Cherwell, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Millicent Gournay 1189 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Gournay V 42 und ihre Mutter Juliana Dammartin 24. Sie hat um 1210 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1239 im Alter von 50 Jahren in This, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich und wurde in Cherwell, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Millicent Gournay è nata il nel 1189 nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh de Gournay V, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Juliana Dammartin, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo circa 1210, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1239, nel This, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Cherwell, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Millicent Gournayが1189年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hugh de Gournay Vは42歳，母Juliana Dammartinは24歳であった。約1210年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでWilliam de Cantilupe 1st Lord Caunteloと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1239年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンススイスで50歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアチェルウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 영국 레이스스터실르 애쉬비 데 라 즈우치
ko.lifeSummary: Millicent Gournay(이)가 1189년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Gournay V(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juliana Dammartin(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1239년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 스이스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 체웰에 묻혔다.

pt.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Millicent Gournay nasceu em 1189, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh de Gournay V, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Juliana Dammartin, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo aproximadamente 1210, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1239, em This, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Cherwell, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Millicent Gournay родилась в 1189 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh de Gournay V было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Juliana Dammartin, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo около 1210 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1239 г. в местности тис, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности чирвелл, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Millicent Gournay nació en 1189, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh de Gournay V, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Juliana Dammartin, tenía 24 años. Se casó con William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo aproximadamente 1210, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1239, en This, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Cherwell, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
